message:
feat: Add GROUP BY and aggregate function support (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX)

- Implement GROUP BY clause execution in SQL executor
- Add aggregate function execution for COUNT(*), COUNT(col), SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX
- Add Accumulator struct for tracking aggregate state
- Parse aggregate function keywords (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX) in parser
- Add comprehensive tests for aggregate functions and GROUP BY
- Consolidate tests in tests/test_sql_executor.zig
